_comment: scribea-local persona → OpenAI voice mapping. Used by ./server.ts when resolving the 'persona' field on POST /synthesize. OpenAI voices (as of 2026-05): alloy, ash, ballad, coral, echo, fable, nova, onyx, sage, shimmer. The 'instructions' field is honored only when model='gpt-4o-mini-tts'.

VMO_A.instructions: Speak as an experienced senior medical consultant on a clinical ward round — measured pace, thoughtful pauses, decisive tone. Australian English register.

VMO_B.instructions: Speak as a senior medical consultant — calm, summative, makes assessment and plan calls. Australian English register.

REG_A.instructions: Speak as a busy ICU registrar reporting observations and actions taken — faster pace, numerical, slightly clipped. Australian English register.

REG_B.instructions: Speak as an ICU registrar handing over — concrete, observation-led, slightly hurried. Australian English register.
